source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
reference: "Kei a tātou ināianei ngā kiore e 4-marama te pakeke kāore i te pāngia e te mate huka, ahakoa i mua i pāngia e te mate huka," tana kōrero tāpiri.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
reference: Ko ngā whakatūpato a Tākuta Ehud Ur, Ahorangi mō te Rongoā ki Te Whare Wānanga o Dalhousie, kei Halifax, Nova Scotia, ko te heamana hoki mō ngā mahi whakamātau rongoā, pūtaiao hoki ki te Canadian Diabetes Association, kei te mata tonu ngā mahi rangahau.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
reference: Pēnei i ētahi atu tōhunga, kei te ruarua kē ōna mahara e pā ana ki te whakaora i te mate huka, me te mōhio iho kāore ēnei kōrero e hāngai ana ki te hunga kua pāngia kētia ki te mate huka momo 1.

source: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
reference: I te Mane, i whakapuaki tūmatanuitia e ara Danius, te hekeretari ū o te Nobel Committee for Literature ki te Swedish Academy, i tētahi hōtaka reo irirangi ki Sveriges Radio ki Huitene ko te komiti, kāore i te āhei ki te whakapā tōtika atu ki a Bob Dylan mō tāna toa i te 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, kua whakarere i āna mahi ki te pā atu ki a ia.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
reference: Nā Danius i kī, "Ināiatonunei kāore mātou i te paku aha. Kua waea atu au, kua tuku īmēra anō hoki ki tōna hoa mahi ngātahi tata rawa, ā, kua tae mai he whakahoki tino hoahoa. Mō tēnei wā, kua nui tērā."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
reference: I mua atu, nā te CEO o Ring, nā Jamie Siminoff i kī, i tīmata te kamupene i te wā kāore tāna pere kuaha i te rangona mai i tana toa ki tōna karāti.

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
reference: I hangaia mai e ia he pere kuaha ahokore.

source: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
reference: I kī a Siminoff i piki ake ngā hokonga whai muri i tana putanga i te hōtaka Shark Tank i te tau 2013 i te wā kāore te paewhiri o te hōtaka i whakaae kia hoatu moni mō te timatanga o te pākihi.

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
reference: I te mutunga o te tau 2017, i kitea a Siminoff ki te hongere pouaka whakaata hoko, ki QVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
reference: I whakatau hoki a Ring i tētahi take ture ki te kamupene whakahaumaru tātāwhāinga, ko te ADT Corporation.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
reference: Ahakoa ko te āhua o tētahi rongoā āraimate e whakamātautauhia ana he āwhina pea i te mate mai i te Ebola, tae noa mai ki tēnei wā, karekau he rongoā kua pai te whakaatu kia whakamaimoa i te pokenga kua pā kē.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
reference: Kotahi te pāhekoheko paturopi, te ZMapp, i whakaatu tuatahi i ētahi putanga papai i te mātai, heoi nā ngā rangahau ōkawa i whakaatu he iti ake ngā painga i tērā i pīrangitia mō te haukoti i te mate.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
reference: Ki te whakamātau PALM, ko Zmapp hei pae, arā ka whakamahia e ngā kaipūtaiao hei pūtake, ā, ka whakatairitea ngā maimoatanga hou e toru i tērā.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
reference: Kei te tautoko a USA Gymnastics i te reta a te United States Olympic Committee, ā, kei te whakaae ki te hiahia waiwai o te whānau Olympic hei tuku i tētahi taiao haumaru mō te katoa o ā mātou kaipara.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
reference: Kei te whakaae mātou ki te tauākī a te USOC ko ngā pānga o ā mātou kaioma, karapū hoki, tae atu ki tā rātou momo hākinakina, ka pai ake te tautoko i a rātou mā te koke whakamua ki te panoni whai tikanga ki roto tonu i tō tātou whakahaere, kaua ko te whakakore tiwhikete.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
reference: Ka tautoko te takaporepore USA i tētahi tirohanga motuhake e rewa ake ai ngā āhutanga whakamanioro o ngā mahinga i kōrerotia māiangia e ngā mōrehu o Larry Nassar, i āhei pea te haere hara kore mō te wā roa, ā, ahakoa te tīnitanga, me mahi.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
reference: He ōrite nei tā USA Gymnastics me tā USOC whāinga - i runga i tēnā kia āta manaakitia te hākinakina takahurihuri kia taea ai e ngā kaiaka te whai i ā rātou whāinga i roto i tētahi taiao manaaki me te tiaki.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
reference: Mō te roanga o ngā tau 1960, i mahi a Brzezinski mā John F. Kennedy hei kaitohutohu, ā, katahi ko te tari o Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
reference: I te wā o ngā kōwhiringa 1976 i tohutohu ia ki a Carter mō ngā kaupapa here ā-ao, ā, kātahi ia ka tū hei National Security Advisor (NSA) mai i te tau 1977 ki te tau 1981, ka whai i a Henare Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: I tōna tūranga ki te NSA, i tautoko ia i a Carter i roto i ngā take huhua o te ao, pērā ki ngā take ki Camp David i te 1978, ngā mahinga ngātahi i waenga i a Amerika me Haina i te pito o ngā tau 1970, ngā uauatanga ki Iran i hua ai te raru nui ki reira i te tau 1979 me te urutomonga o te Soviet ki roto o Afghanistan i te tau 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
reference: Ko te kiriata, e whakaatu ana i a Ryan Gosling me Emma Stone, i tohua ki ngā wāhanga nui katoa.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
reference: I tohua a Gosling rāua ko Stone hei Best Actor me Best Actress.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
reference: Ko ētahi ingoa kē atu kua whakaurungia ko te Pikitia Pai, te kaihautu, te kiriataata, te Hoahoa Tākahu, te Whakatika Kiriata, te Tohu Tuatahi, te Hanga Hoahoa, te Whakapai Oro, te Whakaranu Oro me te Kiriata Taketakenga.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
reference: E rua ngā waiata i te kiriata, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) me City of Stars, i whiwhi whakaaringa mō te waiata tūturu pai rawa. I whiwhi a Lionsgate studio i te 26 whakaaringa - he nui ake i tētahi atu taupuni mahi.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
reference: I te mutunga o te Rātapu, i roto i tētahi tauāki nā te Perehitene o Amerika nā Donald Trump i te heketeri o ngā perehi, i kī ai ka wehe ngā hōia Amerika i a Syria.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: I whakapuakina whai muri i te kōrero ā-waea a Trump ki te Perehetini nō Tākei a Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
reference: Ka whai mana hoki a Tākei mō te tiaki i ngā kaiwhawhai ISIS kua mauheretia, arā, e ai ki te puakitanga, kua karo ngā whenua Ūropi ki te whakahoki atu i a rātou.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
reference: E kī ana tēnei i mau raukura ētahi mokoweri, he ariā e whakaponotia whānuitia ana, engari he kōrero e mau ana ka kore nei e kitea ki runga anga pōhatu, pērā ki te tae, me te tōna hanga ahu tengi nei.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
reference: e kī nei ngā kaipūtaiao ko ngā huruhuru o tēnei kararehe he parauri o runga, ā, he kōmā, he ārani o raro.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
reference: Mā tēnei kitenga e kite ai te māramatanga ki te kukuwhatanga o ngā raukura manu.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
reference: I te mea kāore ngā huruhuru tainahora i te whanake pai i te tuara, e kī ana ko te rachis, ēngari kāore he āhuatanga kē atu o te huruhuru - ko ngā niwha me ngā barbules - e kī ana ngā kairangahau kāore e kore ko te rachis tētahi mea i kukuwha ake i muri ake i ēnei atu āhuatanga.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: E ai ki te hanganga o ngā huru kāore i whakamahia kia rere, engari kē mō te whakahaere paemahana, te whakaaturanga rānei. I marohi ngā kairangahau, ahakoa koinei te whiore o tētahi kūao mokonui, kei te kitea ki te tauira ngā huruhuru pakeke, kaua ko ngā huruhuru pīpī.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: I marohitia e ngā kairangahau, ahakoa koinei te whiore o tētahi mokonui punua, kei te whakaaturia e te tauira ngā huruhuru o te pakeke, kaua ko te pīpī.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
reference: I pahū mai tētahi pōmu waka ki te wharenui o ngā pirhimana ki Gaziantep Tākei i te ata o nanahi. Ka mate ngā pirihimana e rua, ka neke atu i te rua tekau anō i whara.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
reference: I kīia e te tari o te kāwanam he tekau mā iwa o te hunga i whara he pirihimana.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
reference: E whakapae ana ngā pirihimana ko te tangata tūkino he hōia Daesh (ISIL).

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
reference: I kite ai rātou e ōrite ana ngā mātāpono o te Rā ki ētahi atu whetū: Nā te whērikoriko o ngā whetū katoa o te kāhui whetū, ō rātou huringa hoki.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
reference: Kei te whakamahia tahitia te kanapā me te huringa hei whakatau i te tau Rossby a tētahi tau, ā, e hāngai ana tērā ki te rere wētoto.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
reference: Te iti iho o te nama Rossby, ka ngoikore ake te whetū mō te āhuatanga ki te hurihanga aukume.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
reference: I tana haerenga, he nui ngā wā i raru a Iwasaki.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
reference: I pāhua ia e ngā kaiā moana, i tukia ia i Tipete e tētahi kurī kua pāngia e te reipi, i pakiha ia i te mārenatanga i Nepōra, ā, i mauheretia ki Īnia.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
reference: Ko te paerewa 802.11n ka kōkiritia mā runga i te iarere 2.4Ghz me te 5.0Ghz

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
reference: Mā tēnei ka muri hototahi i te 802.11a, te 802.11b me te 802.11g, i runga i te āhuatanga e whai irirangi takirua ana te teihana.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
reference: Ko ngā tere o te 802.11n he tino tere ake i tērā o ngā mea o mua ko tā rātou putanga ariā nui rawa ko te 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
reference: Kāore a Duvall, kua mārenatia me ngā tamaiti pakeke e rua i waiho i tētahi whakaaro nui mō Miller, mō te take o tēnei kōrero.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
reference: Ka pātaia, ko tā Miller, "he ngutu hohoro a Mike i ngā wā o te whakawātanga... i te whakatika au i a au anō, kāore au i rongo i a ia.

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
reference: "Ka ngana tātou kia haukoti i te putanga waro hāora-rua ki ia waeine o te GDP ki tētahi rahinga nui, i mua i te tau 2020 mai i te taumata o te tau 2005," te kī a Hu.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
reference: Kāore ia i whakarite i ētahi nama mō ngā tapatapahi, e kī ana ka whakaritea i runga i te tāputa o te ohaoha o Haina.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
reference: I akiaki a Hu i ngā whenua e whanake ana "kia āraia te huarahi o mua o te parakino i te tuatahi, me te whakapai i muri iho ."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
reference: Nāna i tāpiri "heoi anō, me kaua rātou e tonoa kia hiki i ngā kawenga kei tua atu i tā rātou wā whakawhanaketanga, haepapa, āheinga hoki."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
reference: I tukuna e te Iraq Study Group tāna pūrongo i te 12.00 GMT i tēnei rā.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
reference: He whakatūpato, kāore tētahi e āhei te kī ake mā tētahi mahinga ahakoa te aha e whakatū i te whawhai whakahāweatanga, i ngā kinonga e tupu tonu ana, i te tutūnga o te pūehu rānei ki Irāki.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
reference: Ka tīmata te Rīpoata ki te inoi mō tētahi tautohetohe tūmatawhānui me te whakaritenga o tētahi whakaaetanga ki Ngā Whenua Tōpū o Amerika mō te kaupapa here ki te Waenga o te Rāwhiti.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
reference: E aro nui ana te rīpoata ki ngā āhuatanga katoa kei te kaupapa here mō te kāhui whakahaere ki a Irāki, ā, e whakatenatena hoki i tētahi tirohanga hou.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
reference: Ko te tuatahi o ngā kupu taunaki e 78 kia puta he kaupapa hou i mua i te paunga o tēnei tau e tau ai ngā roherohenga whenua o Īraki hei ārai atu i te hunga urutomo mai, me te whakatū mai anō i ngā hononga i waenganui i ngā hoa piripono.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
reference: I te pō ō nanahi nei whakatauria ai e te kainganga ture ō nāianei, te Māreikura hoki o Argentina, a First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ōna tūmanakotanga mō te perehitini ki La Plata, he taone 50 kiromita (31 maero) nei te tawhiti atu i Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
reference: I whakapuaki a Mrs. Kirchner i tana takune ki te tono i te tūranga perehitene ki te Argentine Theatre, arā ko te wāhi i whakamahia e ia hei tīmata i tana tautohe i te tau 2005 mō te Senate hei mema o te apatono ā-takiwā o Buenos Aires.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
reference: I whakakāngia te tautohe e te whawhai mō te utu ki te whakamāmā me te hanganga anō whai muri i Hurricane Katrina; arā he whakatoi te tapa a ētahi ringa poto i tērā hei "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
reference: Kua aro atu ngā kōrero whakahē huhua o te mahi hanga anō ki te tuku i ngā kirimana hanga anō ki te hunga e whakaarohia ana he hoa nō roto o Washington.

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
reference: Neke atu i te whā miriona tāngata i haere ki Rōma hei tae atu ki te tangi.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
reference: I pērā rawa te tini o ngā tāngata i tae mai kāore i taea e te katoa te tangihanga nei ki St. Pita Tapawhā te tomo.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
reference: Ka whakatūria ētahi mata pouaka whakaata rahi ki ētahi wāhi ki Rōma kia āhei te tangata te mātakitaki i te hui.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
reference: Ki ngā tāone nui kē atu o Itari, ki te toenga o te ao anō hoki, inarā ki Pōrana, i whakaritea pēnei hoki ngā hanganga, ā, i mātakitakihia e te tini o ngā tāngata.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
reference: Kua whakakoha ngā tumu kōrero i ngā kaupapa here o mua o te FBI mō te tuku i ngā rawa ki ngā kēhi he māmā te whakaoti, inarā ko ngā kēhi waka tāhae, me te whāinga o te whakahiki i te pāpātanga angitu o te umanga.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
reference: I tīmata te Kaunihera ki te tautoko ā-pūtea i te kaupapa kerekere i te tau 2005, me te whakatau hoki me rohea kia 10 ngā apataki mai i te FBI ki ngā kiriata pakeke.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
reference: I eke a Robin Uthappa ki ngā piro nui rawa o te wāhanga, arā ko ngā omanga 70 ki te 41 pōro noa iho mā te hau i ngā whā 11, i ngā ono e 2.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
reference: I tino pai te tākaro a ngā kaipatu pōro ō waenganui, a Sachin Tendulkar rāua ko Rahul David, ā, kotahi rau ā rāua piro.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
reference: Heoi anō, whai muri i te ngaronga o tā te kāpene wīkiti i riro noa i a Īnia te 36 omanga me te hinganga o te 7 wīkiti hei whakaoti i te huinga.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
reference: I tae atu a President George W. Bush o Ngā Whenua Tōpū o Amerika ki Hingapoa i te ata o te rā 6 o Noema, i reira i tīmata tētahi haerenga kotahi wiki te roa o Āhia.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: I mihia ia e te Pirimia Tuarua o Hingapoa a Wong Kan Seng, ā, i wānanga i te hokohoko me ngā take whakatuatea ki te Pirimia o Hingapoa a Lee Hsien Loong.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
reference: Whai muri i te kotahi wiki o ngā hinganga ki te kōwhiringa pōti waenga wā, nā Bush i whaki atu ki tētahi minenga mō te whakawhānuitanga o te hokohoko ki Āhia.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
reference: Kua whakaae te Pirimia a Stephen Harper ki te tuku i te "Clean Air Act" o te kāwanatanga ki tētahi komiti pāti-katoa hei arotake, i mua i tana pānuitanga tuarua, ā muri i te hui 25 meneti te roa i te Tūrei ki te kaiārahi NPD a Jack Layton ki te PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
reference: Kua tono a Layton ki ngā panoni ki te pire taiao o ngā conservatives i te hui ki te Pirimia, i te tono ki tētahi "tuhinga anō he ngaio, he tukupū" o te piri taiao o te pāti Conservative.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
reference: Mai rā anō i te tūnga mai o te Kāwanatanga Aka Haumi ki te whakahaere i ngā pūtea o te hōhipera Mersey ki Devonport, Tasmania, kua whakahēngia tēnei mahi e te kāwanatanga ā-motu, e ētahi Mema Pāremata aka haumi hei whakangaio i te aranga atu ki te pōtitanga aka haumi me karanga ā te marama o Noema, ā mua rānei.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
reference: Engari, hei tā te Pirimia, tā John Howard, ko te kaupapa o te pire he manaaki i ngā hohipera kia kore ai ō rātou mana e takahia e te Kāwanatanga o Tāhimana, ka whakawhiwhia ki te AUD$45 miriona.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
reference: E ai ki te pānui hou, ko ngā karere e kī ana mō te pikinga o te moana i rewa ake tētahi tsunami. I rikoata tika i te mahinga tsunami pā tata atu ki pago pago me Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
reference: Kāore he kinonga nui, he whara rānei i rīpoatangia ki Tonga, heoi i ngaro te hiko, ā, nā tenei i ngaro hoki te kaha kia rongo ai i te ohoreretanga mai i te PTWC e pā ana ki te tsunami.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
reference: I katia ngā kura tata ki te takutai moana tekau mā whā mō te katoa o te Wenerei, he aha koa te hikitanga o ngā whakatūpato.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
reference: I rāhiri te Perehitene o Ngā Whenua Tōpū o Amerika a George W. Bush i te puakitanga.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
reference: Mō te āhua ki a Korea ki te Raki, ka kī ake te māngai a Bush, ko Gordon Johndroe, "he āhuatanga nui tēnei ki te whakatutuki i te whakatūturutanga o te pāpurupuru-kore ki runga o te kūrae o Korea.

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
reference: Ko te ingoa o te āwha tuangāhuru ki te whai ingoa o te kaupeka haumātakataka o Atlantic, arā ko Subtropical Storm Jerry, i rewa ake ki te Atlantic Ocean i te rā nei.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
reference: E kī ana te National Hurricane Center (NHC) i tēnei wā kāore he whakatuma tō Jerry ki te whenua.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
reference: Kei te whakatau tata ngā U.S. Corps of Engineers ko te 6 īnihi o te hekenga ua ka wāwāhi pea i ngā maioro kua pakaru kē.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
reference: Ko te Ninth Ward, i reira i waipuketia tae atu ki te 20 putu te teitei i te wā o Hurricane Katrina, kei te noho ki raro i te wai he hope te teitei i te ekenga o te maioro oneone tata.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
reference: Kei te maringi te wai i te maioro ki tētahi wāhanga e 100 putu te whānui.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
reference: Nā te Commons Administrator a Adam Cuerden i whakapuaki i tōna hōhā mō ngā whakakorenga i tana kōrero atu ki Wikinews i tērā marama.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
reference: "I rūkahu noa ia [a Wales] ki a mātou mai i te tīmatanga. Tuatahi, nā te mahi anō nei he take ā-ture mō tēnei. Tuarua, nā te whakaata i tāna whakarongo mai ki a mātou, tae noa atu ki te whakakorenga o āna toi."

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
reference: Nā te hīrawerawe ā-hapori ngā mahi o nāianei hei tuhi hukihuki i tētahi kaupapa here e pā ana ki ngā kiko onioni mō te pae tukutuku kei reira ngā tini miriona pāpaho raihana-tuwhera.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Ko te nuinga o ngā mahi i oti he mahi ariā, engari kua tuhia te hōtaka kia whakarite ki ngā tironga o te ikarangi o Sagittarius.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
reference: Ko te hua e rapua ana i te tīma ko tētahi ka rewangia ake e ngā ngarungaru kaha i waenga i te pō uriuri o te ikarangi me te pō tangotango o te mangōroa.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Pērā i te tō mai a te marama ki te ao, me tāna whakarite i ngā tai, ka pērā hoki te tuku tōpana a te Te Ika-whenua-o-te-rangi ki te ikarangi Sagittarius.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
reference: I taea e ngā kaiputaiao te whakatau, ko te mea pouri ka pā e ētahi atu mea pouri i te āhuatanga ōrite ki te mea noa nei.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
reference: E mea ana tēnei ariā ko te pōuriuri mei te ao tukupū

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
reference: E whakaatu ana ngā pāhotanga pouaka whakaata i te auahi mā e puta ana i te hanganga.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
reference: E whakahau ana ngā mana-ā-rohe o te takiwa o te hanganga kia noho iho ki rō whare, kia whakaweto i ngā whāhauhau, kia kauaka te wai o te kōrere e inungia.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
reference: E ai ki te tari karihi a Hapani, kua kitea te cesium irirangi me te iodine e tupu ana i te wāhi mahi.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
reference: Kei te whakapae ngā mana he tohu tēnei i whakapakaru pea ngā ipu o te kora konukarihi ki te wāhi, ā, kei te komama.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: I kitea e Tākuta tony Moll i te Taru Ārai Nui mō te Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) ki te rohe o Awhiriki ki te Tonga, ki te rohe o KwaZulu i Natal.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
reference: I roto i tetahi uiui, ka kī ia ko te rerenga hou he "nui te tupono he mea whakararu, he mea pāwera i runga i te pāpātanga hemo tino teitei."

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
reference: Kua pāngia ētahi tūroro e te ngārara ki te hohipera, te whakaaro a Dr. Moll, ā, tokorua i te itinga iho he kaimahi hauora hohipera.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
reference: I roto i te tau kotahit, ka pāngia ngā tāngata 10 ki te 15 e te tangata kua pāngia.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
reference: Heoi, ko te ōrau XDR-TB o te hunga katoa e pāngia ana e te mate tuberculosis he iti noa; 6,000 ō roto i te 33,000 tāngata e māuiui ana ki Aherika ki te Tonga.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
reference: Ko ngā āmiorangi, ko te taumaha o ia āmiorangi he nui ake i te 1,000 pauna, ā, tata ki te 17,500 māero ia hāora te tere e hāereere ana, ka tukituki i te 491 māero ki runga i te Ao.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
reference: I kī ake ngā kaupūtaiao i rahi te pahūtanga mai nō te tukinga.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
reference: E ngana tonu nei rātou ki te whakatau i pēhea te nui o te tūtukitanga me te āhuatanga ki te pānga hoki ki te ao.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
reference: Kei te whai te United States Strategi Command o te tari a te Department of Defense a Ngā Whenua Tōpū o Amerika i ngā toenga.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
reference: Ko te putanga o te tātaritanga ira ka whakairihia ki tētahi pae tukutuku tūmatanui.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
reference: Ka hāmenetia tētahi tākuta i mahi ki te Hohipera mō ngā Tamariki ki Pittsburgh, ki Pennsylvania, mō te kōhurutanga whai muri mai i tōna kitenga i te kāreti o tōna motuka tōna māmā e tīraha ana, e ai ki ētahi rangatira ki Ohio

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
reference: I kitea a Takuta Malar Balasubramanian, 29, i Blue Ash Ohio, he whaitūā tōna 15 mairo ki te raki o Cincinnati e takoto ana ki te papa i te taha o te rori, he tīhāte he tarau raro, ā, e kī ana i kitea ia i roto i tētahi hanga tīno rongoā.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
reference: I tohu ia i ngā āpiha ki tōna Oldsmobile Intrigue pango, e 500 putu te tawhiti atu.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
reference: Ki rēira rātou kite ai i te tinana o Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, kua uhia ki ngā paraikete toto.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
reference: Nā ngā pirihimana i kī ko te āhua nei kua takoto te tūpāpaku ki reira mō te tata ki te rangi kotahi.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
reference: I pūrongotia ngā kēhi tuatahi o te tahumaero i tēnei kaupeka i te mutunga o Hōngongoi.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
reference: Kei te kawea te tahumaero e te poaka, kātahi ka neke ki te tangata ki te naenae.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
reference: Nā te tino pikinga i te mahi te kāwanatanga o Īnia i ētahi mahi pērā i te tuku i ngā kaiwhakamau poaka ki ngā wāhi e tino pāngia ana, te tuku i ngā tini mano ārai naenae, me te uwhiuwhi i ngā paturiha.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
reference: Kua oatitia te tini miriona ipu o te ārai mate encephalitis e te kāwanatanga, hei reira e āwhinatia ngā tari hauora te whakarite mō tērā tau.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
reference: I takaroatia ngā mahere kia tukuna ngā rongoā āraimate ki ngā rohe kua tino pāngia i mua i tēnei tau i runga i te korenga o ngā pūtea me te whakaarotau iti e hāngai ana ki ētahi atu tahumaero.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
reference: I te 1956 i hūnuku a Slania ki Sweden, ka toru tau ki reira katahi ia ka mahi mā te pau tāpeta o Sweden, ā, ka noho hei rangatira enekarawha.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
reference: 1,000 ngā pane kuini i hangaia mō Sweeden me ētahi atu whenua e 28 te nui.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
reference: Kei te pērā rawa te mōhiohio ki te kounga me te whakatarapī o tāna mahi ko ia tētahi o ngā "ingoa e kōrerotia ana ki ngā kāinga" o te hunga mātai pane kuīni. Kei te aro atu ētahi ki te kohi i āna mahi anake.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
reference: Ko tāna pane kuīni tua 1,000 ko te "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" mīharo nā David Klocker Ehrenstrahl i te tau 2000, kua rārangihia ki te Guinness Book of World Records.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
reference: I mahi hoki ia i te whakairo i ngā pepa tāra ki ngā tini whenua, ko ētahi tauira o āna mahi nō nākuanei ko ngā whakaahua Pirimia ki te taha whakamua o te tāra $5 me te $100 hou o Kānata.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
reference: I muri i te pānga o te aituā, i kawea a Gibson ki tētahi hōhipera engari kāore i roa ka mate ia.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
reference: Kāore i whara te kaitaraiwa taraka, e 64 te pakeke, i te tukituki.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
reference: I tōngia atu te waka ake i te wāhi o te tukituki i te tata ki te 1200 GMT i taua rangi tonu.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
reference: Nā tētahi kaimahi te kī, nōnā e mahi ana ki tētahi karāti e pātata ana, "I reira anō ngā tamariki e whakawhiti ana i te rori, ā, i te hāparangi, i te tangi rātou."

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
reference: I auraki tā rātou oma mai i te wāhi i aituangia ai.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
reference: Ko ētahi atu kaupapa ki te rārangi take ki Bali ko te whakarauora i ngā ngahere o te ao e toe ana, me te tuari i ngā hangarau ki te āwhina i ngā motu e whanake haere ana ki te tipu i runga i ngā āra he iti iho te parahanga.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
reference: Kei te tūmanako hoki te Kotahitanga o Ngā Iwi o te Ao ki te whakaū i tētahi pūtea hei tautoko i ngā whenua e pāngia ana e te mahana haere o te ao kia puta i ngā pānga.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
reference: Ka taea te moni te tuku ki ngā whare haukoti waipuke, te whakahaerenga pai ake i te wai, me te whakawhānui i te kanorau huanga kai.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
reference: Nā Flute te tuhingā mō te tutukinga-kore o te ngana a ētahi ki te whakakore i ngā wāhine mai i te kōrero mō te hauora o te wahine.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
reference: I puta ai tāna whakatau nā ngā kōrero papai i tukuna ki a ia, wāhine mai, tāne mai hoki, e whakahau ana he mea nui te mau uhi ārai.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
reference: I te mutunga o te whawhai whai muri i te haringa o ngā tūroro ki te hōhipera, i noho atu tōna 40 o ngā mauhere ki te iari, ā, kāore i whai kia hoki ki ō rātou rūma herehere.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
reference: I ngana ngā kaiwhakarite ki te whakatika i te āhuatanga, engari kāore i te mārama ngā hiahia o ngā herehere.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
reference: I waenganui i te 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, i whakakāngia tētahi e ngā herehere ki te iari.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
reference: Ā tata nei, ka kōkiritia te iāri e ngā āpiha he kaka whawhai ō rātou, me te whakararu i ngā kaiherehere ki te haurehu waikamo.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
reference: Ahakoa te wā, i tīneia te ahi i mua i te 11:35 pm e ngā kairanga kaitiaki ahi.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
reference: Whai muri i te hanganga o te pāpuni i te tau 1963, i aukatingia ngā waipuke ā-kaupeka kua tino toha pari puta noa i te awa.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
reference: I tika ngā parataiao mō te hanganga o ngā tāhuna me ngā takutai moana, i noho hoki ai hei taiao mō ngā kararehe mohoao.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
reference: Me te aha, kua korehāhā ētahi momo ika e rua, ā, ētahi atu ika e rua kua tīno mōrearea, tae atu ki te humpback chub.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
reference: Ahakoa ka piki te taumata o te wai mā ngā putu ruarua ā muri i te waipuke, kei te tūmanako ngā āpiha ka rawaka kia whakahaumanu i ngā pae oneone ngāhorohoro ki raro iho.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
reference: Kāore tētahi whakatūpato tai āniwhaniwha i tukua, ā, e ai ki te tari takotoranga whenua o Jakarta, kāore tētahi whakatūpato tai āniwhaniwha e tukua i te mea kāore te rū o te whenua i tae ki te hiahia o te 6.5.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
reference: Ahakoa te korenga o ngā whakatūpato mō te tai āniwhaniwha, i maurirere ngā kainoho ki reira, ā, i timata te wehe i ā rātou pakihi, i ō rātou kāinga anō hoki.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
reference: Ahakoa i tangi a Winfrey i tōna wehenga, ko tāna ki ana kaitautoko ka hoki mai anō ia.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
reference: "Ehara tēnei i te poroporoaki. Koinei te otinga o te wāhanga kotahi, me te tuwheratanga o tetahi mea hou."

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
reference: Kua tohua e ngā putanga whakamutunga o ngā pōtitanga perehitene, pāremata hoki kua pōtitia anō te perehitene o mua, a Hifikepunye Pohamba, ki te tatau nui.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
reference: Nā te pāti whai mana, arā te South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), i pupuri hoki i te rahinga ki ngā kōwhiringa pāremata.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
reference: I neke ngā ope tauā Coalition me ngā Afghan ki te rohe hei whakamau i te wāhi, ā, kua tukuna ētahi atu waka rererangi o te kotahitanga ki te tautoko.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
reference: I te tihi rā anō o te whenua maunga nei te wāhi i tūtukingia ai, ā, e whakaponotia ana nā te pū taraweti i pēnei ai.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
reference: Kei te herea ngā mahi ki te rapu i te wāhi tukituki e te huarere kino, me te whenua pakeke.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
reference: E ai ki te rōpū aroha ā-rongoā a Mangola, i te Medecines Sans Frontieres me te World Health Organisation koinei te urutā kino rawa kua tuhia ki te whenua rā.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
reference: Ko te kaikorero mō ngā Medecines a Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman te kī: "E anga atu ana a Angola ki te horapatanga kino rawa, ā, e kino rawa tonu ana ki Angola".

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
reference: I tīmata ngā kēmu i te 10:00 i te ata, me te pai rawa o te huarere atu i te kōnehunehu i waenga i te ata ka tere mao atu, ā, he rangi pai rawa mō te whutupōro 7.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
reference: Ko ngā kākano o runga o te tātāwhāinga a Āwherika ki te Tonga i tīmata tika i tā rātou toa 26 - 00 ki Tāmipia e tuarima ana te kākano.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
reference: He tino taumaha te āhua i te kēmu ki ō rātou tuakana nō te tonga, heoi anō i piki haere a Āwherika ki te Tonga i te ahunga whakamua o te taiwhanga.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
reference: Nā te pai o te ārai, nā ngā pukenga pai ki te rāwekeweke i te pōro, nā te mahi tahi i puta ai te ihu, ā, mārama noa ana te kite ko rātou te tino tīma.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
reference: Kua whakina e ngā āpiha mō te tāone nui o Amsterdam me te Anne Frank Museum kua pāngia te rākau e tētahi hekaheka, ā, he whakatuma hauora tūmatanui ia nā tā rātou tautohe ka tūpono hinga taua rākau.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
reference: Te tikanga ka poroa hei te Tūrei, engari nā runga i te ohorere o te whakataunga kōti i kore ai.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
reference: E 100 ki te 250 mita (328 ki te 820 putu) i te itinga iho te whitianga o nga tomokanga ana katoa, kua tapaina ki "The Seven Sisters".

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
reference: Ka whakaatu ngā pikitia hihi pōkākā i ngā pāmahana rerekē i te awatea me te pō e whakaaturia ana he ana pea ērā.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
reference: He makariri ake i te mata karapoti i te rā, he mahana ake i te pō.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: "Kāore ōna whanonga ngāwhā e pēnei te tau i ngā ana nunui o te Ao nei e āhua ū ana te paemahana, ēngari e hāngai ana tērā kia noho ēnei hei puare hohono kei te papa," ko te kupu tēnei a Glen Cushing nō te Astreology Team o te United States Geological Survey (USGS), ā, nō Northern Arizona University kei Flagstaff, Arizona hoki.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
reference: Ki Wīwī, kua roa te pōti e noho ana hei wheako iti-hangarau: ka whakamohoao te kaipōti i a ia ki tētahi wharau, ā, ka whakatakoto i tētahi whārangi pepa kua tāngia i mua e tohu ana i te kaitono e kōwhiritia ana ki tētahi kōpaki.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
reference: Whai muri i te whakatūturu a te āpiha ki te tuakiri o te kaipōti, ka raua atu e te kaipōti tana kōpaki ki roto i te pouaka pōti, ā, ka hāina ai i te pukapuka pōti.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
reference: He māro ngā whakaherenga a te ture pōti ki Wīwī.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
reference: Mai i te tau 1988, me whakatīaho ngā pouaka pōti kia kitea e ngā kaipōti, e te hunga mātakitaki kāore he kōpaki ki reira hei te tīmatanga o te pōti, ā, kāore he kōpaki e tāpiritia atu i ērā o ngā kaipōti ka āta tautehia, ka āta whakamanahia.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
reference: Ka taea e ngā kaitono te tuku kaiwhakarite hei mataara i ia wāhanga o te hātepe. I te ahiahi pō, ka tatauhia ngā pōti e ngā kaimahi tūao ki raro i te tino mātakitanga, me te whai i ētahi tikanga motuhake.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
reference: Ka tū a ASUS Eee PC, kua whakarewaina i mua puta noa i te ao mō ngā āhuatanga penapena-utu me te pai o te mahi, hei kaupapa nui i 2007 Taipei IT Month.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
reference: Ēngari ko te mākete kaihokohoko mō te ririhiko pōnaho ka tīno tīni whai muri i te rironga a ASUS i te paraihe Sustainable Taiwan 2007 mai i te kaiwhakahaere i a Yuan nō te whenua rangatiratanga o Hāina.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
reference: Kei te whakaaturia e te pae tukutuku hou o te teihana te whakaaturanga hei "whakaari ā-reo irirangi o mua me te āhuatanga hou, kino te pakihawa!"

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
reference: I ōna rā tīmatanga, i whakaaturia anake te hōtaka ki te pae tukutuku reo irirangi ā-ipurangi kua roa e tū ana a TogiNet Radio, arā ko tētahi pae tukutuku e aro ana ki te reo irirangi kōrero.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
reference: I te pito o te tau 2015 i whakarewatia e TogiNet te AstroNet Radio hei teihana tuarua.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
reference: I te tuatahi, i rongohia ngā reo a te tauhou e noho ana ki East Texas.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
reference: I haere tonu te whānuitanga o ngā mahi pāruarua i te roanga o te pō, i runga i te mea kāore ngā kaiwhakauruhi ture i reira, i ngā tiriti o Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
reference: I whakaaturia e tētahi kaimātakitaki ko Bishkek e totohu ana ki te āhua o te "ture kore", i te hīkoi haere o ngā kēnge tāngata ki ngā tiriti, e mūrei ana i ngā rawa kaihoko i ngā toa.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
reference: I whakawhiua ngā kaiporotēhi nō te tonga e te hunga kei Bishkek e noho ana mō ā rātou mahi whakapōauau.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: Kua toa a Āwherika ki te Tonga i ngā Ōpango (Aotearoa) ki tētahi kēmu whutupōro Tri Nations ki te Royal Bafokeng Stadium ki Rustenburg, ki Āwherika ki te Tonga.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
reference: Ko te piro whakamutunga ko te toa kotahi-piro, 21 ki te 20, ka mutu ki te rerenga toa 15 kēmu te roa o ngā Ōpango.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
reference: Mō ngā Springboks, i whakaoti i tētahi hinganga auau e rima.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
reference: Koirā te kēmu whakamutunga mō te kapa Ōpango, kua whiwhi kē rātou i te paraihee rua wiki ki muri.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
reference: Ka tū te kēmu whakamutunga o te raupapa ki Ellis Park ki Johannesburg hei tērā wiki, hei reira ngā Springboks e tākaro ki a Ahitereiria.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
reference: He rū whenua māmā nei i haruru ai te rāwhiti o Montana i te 10:08 p.m o te Mane.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
reference: Kāore he pūrongo tangetange mō te pakaru kua riro i te United States Geological Survey (USGS) me tana National Earthquake Information Center.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
reference: Ko te pokapū o te rū whenua ko te tata ki te 20 km (15 maero) ki te raki mā raki mā rāwhiti o Dillon, ā, me te tata ki te 65 km (40 maero) ki te tonga o Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
reference: Kua whakatūturutia te whēnanau mate rewharewha manu patu tangata, H5N1, kia pāngia tētahi rakiraki puihi kua mate, i kitea i te Mane, i roto i te rēpō tata atu ki Lyon i te rāwhiti o Wīwi.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
reference: Ko Wīwī te whenua tuawhitu o te Uniana o Ūropi kia patua rawangia e tēnei huaketo; Whai mai ana ko Ateria, ko Tiamani, ko Horowinia, ko Purukaria, ko Kirihi me Itāria.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
reference: Ko ngā kēhi o te H5N1 ki Croatia me Denmark kāore anō i tautohukia.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
reference: Kua whakawhiua te Atua e Chambers, "nā te parekura, nā te haukotinga o te nui o te tangata e noho mai nei i tēnei ao hurihuri.

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
reference: Kei te tautohe a Chambers, he kaiwhakahāwea ia, ko tana kerēmi ki te kōti he "hangahanga", ā, "ka taea e wai ake te hāmene i a wai ake."

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
reference: Ko te pūrākau e whakaaturia ana ki te whakaari Wīwī, nā Camille Saint-Saens, ko te kōrero mō tētahi ringa toi "ko tōna ao e tohua ana e te aroha ki ngā tarukino me Hapani."

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
reference: Me te aha, ka momi ngā kaiwhakaari i ngā momi tarupai ki runga atamira, ā, he whakahau nei rātou i te minenga kia whai mai hoki.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
reference: I tuawhā, tuarima, tuaono a Newt Gingrich, te Māngai o te Whare o mua, a Rick Perry, te kāwana o Texas, me te wahine tōrangapū a Michele Bachmann.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
reference: Kia tae rā anō mai ngā whakatau, ka īnoi a Gingrich ki a Santorum, engari ka whakatāmaramara ki a Romney nā wai ngā mahi whakatairanga hē i tuku kia whakaatuhia ki Iowa mō Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
reference: I kī a Perry māna e "hoki atu ki Texas hei arotake i ngā putanga o te kāhui i tēnei pō, me te whakatau mēnā rānei he ara ki mua mōku ake ki tēnei rēhi", engari ā muri ake ka kī ia ka noho tonu ia ki te rēhi me te whakataetae ki te tuatahi.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
reference: I whakatau a Bachmana, nāna i toa ki te Ames Straw Poll i Here-turi-kōkā, ki te whakaoti i tana whawhai.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
reference: I kawea te kaiwhakaahua ki Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, nā wai rā ka mate ia ki reira.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
reference: E ai ki ngā kōrero, i ngā tau 20 ia. I roto i tētahi kōrero, i kī a Bieber " ahakoa kāore au i whai wāhi ake ki tēnei aitua, e whakaaro nui ana ki te whānau e noho pani ana."

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
reference: Ko te mōhio a te pae tukutuku pūrongo o te wā ā-rēhia a TMZ i tū te waka a te kaiwhakaahua ki tērā atu taha o Sepulveda Boulevard me te ngana ki te mau whakaahua o te wāhi tūnga pirihimana i mua i te whakawhiti i te huarahi me te koke tonu, i reira te pirihimana California Highway Patrol e whakahaere ana i te tūnga waka ki te tohu i a ia kia hoki atu, kia rua ngā wā.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
reference: Hei tā te pirihimana, kāore pea te kai taraiwa o te waka i tūtuki ai ki te kai mau whakaahua e hāmenetia.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
reference: I te mea 18 noa ngā mētara ka whakawhiwhia i ia rā, he nui ngā whenua kāore i whai wāhi mai.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
reference: E tāpiri atu nei ko Netherlands, ko Anna Jochemsen te tuaiwa o te karauna tūru wahine i te Hupa-G īnānahi, me Finland me Katja Saarinen ka mutu tuatekai i te mahinga ōrite.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: I oti tekau mā tahi a Mitchell Gourley nō Ahitereiria i te Super-G tū tāne. I oti tekau mā ono a Oldrich Jelinek te kaiwhakataetae nō Tiekerowākia i te Super-G noho tāne.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
reference: I mutu tekau mā rima a Arly Velasquez nō Mehiko i te nōhanga Super-G tāne. I tuaiwa a Adam Hall nō Aotearoa i te tūnga Super-G tāne.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: Ko tā Pōrana kaieke retireti tāne kua hauā te ataata a Maciej Krezel, me te kaiārahi a Anna Ogarzynska i oti tekau mā toru i te Super-G. I oti rua tekau mā whā tā Kōria ki te Tonga a Jong Seork Park i te Super-G noho tāne.

source: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.
reference: Kei te heitaratia te hunga whakatau i te rangimārie nō te Kotahitanga o Ngā Iwi o te Ao, i tae atu rātou ki Haiti whai muri mai i te rū 2010, mō te horapa haere o te tahumaero i tīmata ai tata ki te wāhi noho o taua ope.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
reference: E ai tā te whakawākanga, ko ngā uruurua mai i te puni UN kāore i tika te horoihia, nā tēnā i uru ngā huakita ki te Awa o Artibonite, tētahi o ngā tīno nunui o Haiti.

source: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.
reference: I mua i te taenga atu o ngā ope tauā, kua kore a Haiti i te pāngia e ngā raru e pā ana ki te tahumaero mai i te rautau 1800.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
reference: Kua kōrero tohutoru te Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy i ngā rangahau motuhake e marohi ana i kawea i runga i te kore mōhio te ope mau i te rongo Nepōra nō te Kotahitanga o Ngā Iwi o te Ao i te tahumaero ki Haiti.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
reference: Kote whakatau a tētahi mātanga tahumaero nō te UN, a Danielle Lantagne, nā ngā kaipupuri rongopai te pakarutanga i para.

source: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.
reference: I whakatūturutia e Hamilton i whakaurua e Howard University Hospital te tūroro ki te āhua ū.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
reference: I haere te tūroro ki Nigeria, ki te wāhi i mate ai ētahi i te mate urutā Ebola.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
reference: Kua whai te hōhipera i ngā tikanga mō te tāmi pokenga, tae atu ki te whakawehe i te tūroro i ētahi atu hei ārai i te whakapoke pea i ētahi atu.

source: Before The Simpsons Simon had worked on several shows in various positions.
reference: I mua i te hōtaka Simpsons, inā te huhua o ngā wāhi mahi me ngā tūranga mahi i mau i a Simon.

source: During the 1980s he worked on shows such as Taxi, Cheers, and The Tracy Ullman Show.
reference: I ngā tau 1980 i mahi ia ki ngā hōtaka pērā i te Taxi, Cheers, me te Tracy Ullman Show.

source: In 1989 he helped create The Simpsons with Brooks and Groening, and was responsible for hiring the show's first writing team.
reference: I te tau 1989 nāna i āwhina ki te hanga i The Simpsons ki a Brooks rāua ko Groening, ā, i haepapa ia mō te whakarite i te rōpū tuhi tuatahi o te whakaaturanga.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
reference: Ahakoa i wehe atu ia i te whakaaturanga i te tau 1993 i mau tonu ia i te tūranga kaihautū matua, ā, i riro tonu i a ia ngā tini tekau miriona tāra ia tau hei tiringa.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
reference: I mua tata nei i rīpoatangia e te kaiwhakahaere kawepūrongo Hainamana, e Xinhua te kāhaki o tētahi waka rererangi.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
reference: I ngā ripoata o muri atu i kī ake i tae tētahi whakatuma poma ki te waka rererangi, ā, i autakina atu ki Āwhekenetāna, ka tau iho ki Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
reference: Ko ngā rīpoata moata i kī nei, i auraki atu te rererangi ki Afghanistan whai muri i te korenga i whakaae kia tau ohotata atu ki Urumqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
reference: E tino kitea ana ngā aituā rererangi ki Irāna, kei a rātou te kāhui pakeke haere e kino ana te tuarā mō ngā paheko tūmatanui, ope tauā anō hoki.

source: International sanctions have meant that new aircraft cannot be purchased.
reference: Ko te hua o ngā aukati ā-ao e kore e taea ngā waka rererangi hou te hoko.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
reference: I te timatanga mai o te wiki nei i tūtuki te whaka topatopa porihimana ka mate te toko toru ka tūrorongia te toko toru kē atu.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
reference: I tērā marama i kitea e Irāna tana aituā hau takiwā kino rawa mō ngā tini tau i te tukituki a tētahi waka rererangi e haere ana ki Amēnia, me te whakamate i te 168 ki runga.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
reference: I taua marama tonu i kitea anō tētahi atu waka rererangi e pahemo ana i te ara rerenga ki Mashhad, ā, ka tūtuki ki tētahi pakitara, ka mate te tekau mā whitu.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
reference: Kua whakakorehia e Aerosmith te toinga atu o tā rātou haerenga.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
reference: I tae te wā kia tāpoi te pēne i Ngā Whenua Tōpū o Amerika me Kānata tae noa ki te 16 o Hepetema.

source: They have cancelled the tour after lead singer Steven Tyler was injured after he fell off stage while performing on August 5.
reference: Kua whakakore rātou i te haerenga i muri i te whara a te kaiwaiata ārahi a Steven Tyler i muri i tana hinga i te atamira i te wā e whakaatu ana i te 5 o Ākuhata.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
reference: I hinga a Murray i te huinga tuatahi i te whawhati piro ōrite i muri i te mau a ngā tāne e rua ki ia hau ki te huinga.

source: Del Potro had the early advantage in the second set, but this too required a tie break after reaching 6-6.
reference: I a Del Potro te kāhukahuka wawe ki te huinga tuarua, engari i hiahiatia hoki tēnei i te paenga whitu i muri i te tae atu ki te 6-6.

source: Potro received treatment to his shoulder at this point but managed to return to the game.
reference: I riro i a Potro he rongoā mō tana pokohiwi i tēnei wā ēngari i hoki tonu atu ki te kēmu.

source: The program started at 8:30 p.m. local time (15.00 UTC).
reference: I tīmata te hōtaka i te 8.30 p.m. takiwā (15.00 UTC)

source: Famous singers across the country presented bhajans, or devotional songs, to Shri Shyam's feet.
reference: I tuku ngā kaiwaiata rongonui puta noa i te motu i ngā bhajans, arā ko ngā waiata whakapono, ki ngā waewae o Shri Shyam.

source: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: I tīmata te kaiwaiata a Sanju Sharma i taua pō, whai muri mai ko Shankar Choudhary. Esented the chhappan bhog bhajan hoki. Ko te kaiwaiata a Raju Khandelwal i tautoko i a ia.

source: Then, Lakkha Singh took the lead in singing the bhajans.
reference: I reira, ka riro ko Lakkha Singh te kaiwaiata matua mō te waiata bhajans.

source: 108 plates of Chhappan Bhog (in Hinduism, 56 different edible items, like, sweets, fruits, nuts, dishes etc. which are offered to deity) were served to Baba Shyam.
reference: E 108 ngā pereti o te Chhappan Bhog (i te Hinitu, e 56 ngā tāonga ō, pēnei i ngā kai reka, ngā huarākau, ngā hua, ngā rīhi ngā mea ngā mea e hoatu nei ki ngā atua) i tukua atu ki a Baba Shyam.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: I tuku hoki a Lakkha Singh i te chhappan bhog bhajan. Ki tōna taha ko te kaiwaiata a Raju Khandelwal.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
reference: I te whakāturanga notekī i te Taite o ngā kēmu whakātu o Tokyo, i huraina e te perehitini o te Nintendo e Satoru Iwata te hanganga raumamao mō te Nintendo hou raumamao whanaketanga a te kamupene.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
reference: He āhua ōrite te hanga ki tētahi roumamao, ā, e whakamahi ana te kaiwhakahaere i ngā paerongo e rua e whakatakotoria ana tata ki te pouaka whakaata a te kaimahi hei ine tapatoru i tana tūnga ki te wāhi ahu-toru.

source: This will allow players to control actions and movements in video games by moving the device through the air.
reference: Mā tēnei ka taea ngā kaitākaro te nukunuku haere i roto i ō rātou mahi ataata mā te hiki i te taputapu ki te rangi.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
reference: I hē te whakahaeretanga o tana waka i a Giancarlo Fisichella, nā tēnā i mutu te reihi whai muri tata i te tīmatanga.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
reference: Ko tana hoa ko Fernando Alonso i te ārahi i te reihi mō te nuinga, heoi i mutu whai muri i tana tau ki te taunga waka, akuanei pea i pēnei i te mea i raruraru te wīrā katau o mua.

source: Michael Schumacher ended his race not long after Alonso, because of the suspension damage in the numerous battles during the race.
reference: Kaore i roa i muri mai i a Alonso ka mutu te reihi a Michael Schumacher i te mea o ngā pakarūtanga ki te mihini i roto i ngā whawhai tini o te reihi.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
reference: "He tino ātaahua ia, ā, he reo rōreka hoki tōna," hei tāna i roto i tētahi hopunga kōrero ki tētahi whare kōrero.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
reference: I pupū ake nei te ihiihi ki roto i ahau mō ngā wā katoa i haratau ai mātou i tēnei, mai i te whatumanawa.

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
reference: Tōna 3 miniti o roto mai i te wehenga, ka whakaatu tētahi kāmera o runga i te whakaekenga i ngā wāhanga maha o ngā ārai pāhuka e pākaru mai ana i te ipu kora.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
reference: Heoi, e whakaarotia ana, kāore i pā he kino ki ngā waka.

source: NASA's shuttle program chief N. Wayne Hale Jr. said the foam had fallen "after the time we are concerned about."
reference: Nā te rangatira hōtaka waka kōpiko a NASA a N. Wayne Hale Jr. I kī kua hinga te huka "i muri i te wā e aro ana mātou."

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
reference: Ka rima meneti i muri i te tīmatanga o te whakaaturanga ka tīmata tētahi hau te pupuhi, ā, kotahi meneti whai muri ake, kua tae atu te hau ki te 70km/h... Kātahi ka tae mai te ua, engari ka pērā rawa te kaha, te rahi ka patua te kiri pērā i te ngira, kātahi ka rere te hukawaitara i te rangi, ka maurirere te hunga, ka tioro, ka takahi tētahi i tētahi.

source: I lost my sister and her friend, and on my way there were two disabled people in wheelchairs, people just jumping over and pushing them," Armand Versace said.
reference: "I ngaro i a au taku tuahine me tana hoa, nōku e haere ana ka tūpono au ki te hauā tokorua nei, e pekepeke noa ana, e whana noa ana te iwi nei i a rāua," te kōrera a Armand Versace.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
reference: Hei tā te rīpoata a NHK e pai noa ana ngā whakahaeretanga a te wharau hua ruarua ki Niigata.

source: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. reported no effects from the earthquake and that the Number 1 and 2 reactors at its Shika nuclear power plant were shut down.
reference: I pūrongotia e te Hokuriku Electric Power Co. kāore he pānga i te rū, ā, kua aukatia ngā pūrere Number 1 me te Number 2 ki tōna wāhi pūrere karihi Shika.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
reference: Kei te pūrongotia ko tōna 9400 ngā kāinga ki te takiwā kua kore wai, ā, tata ki te 100 kua kore hiko.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
reference: Kua pakaru ētahi huarahi, kua raru te ratonga tereina i ngā wāhi e pāngia ana, ā, kua kati tonu te wāhi Noto Airport ki Ishikawa.

source: One bomb exploded outside the governor general's office.
reference: I pahū tētahi pōmu ki waho i te tari a te kāwana tianara.

source: Three more bombs exploded near government buildings in a period of two hours.
reference: E toru anō ngā poma i pahū tata ki ngā whare o te kāwanatanga i roto i ngā hāora e rua.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
reference: E ai ki ētahi rīpoata ka whakatau i te nui o ngā mate ki te waru, ā, ko ngā rīpoata ōkawa e whakaae ana ki ngā wharanga tae atu ki te 30; ēengari kāore anō ngā tau otinga kia whakatau.

source: Both cyanuric acid and melamine were found in urine samples from pets that died after consuming contaminated pet food.
reference: I kitea te waikawa hingariki me te metamine ki roto i ngā tīpakonga mimi a ngā mōkai i mate ai nā te kai i ngā kai mōkai kua tāhawahawatia.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
reference: Nā ngā kai rangahau o te whare wānanga te kī, ka hohe ngā pūhui e rua tētahi ki tētahi kia hanga tioata e kati pea ai i te mahinga o te whatumanawa.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
reference: I kite ngā kairangahau i te hanganga mai o ngā tioata ki te mimi ngeru i te tāpiritangao te melamine me te cyanuric acid.

source: The composition of these crystals matches those found in the urine of affected pets when compared by infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).
reference: Ko te hanganga o ēnei tioata e hāngai ana ki ērā ka kitea ki te mimi o ngā mōkai e pāngia ana ina ka whakatairitea mā te mātaitanga rārangi aho hihi pōkākā (infrared spectroscopy, FTIR).

source: I don't know if you realize it or not, but most of the goods from Central America came into this country duty-free.
reference: Kāore au i te mōhio mēnā kei te mōhio rānei koe, heoi ko te nuinga o ngā rawa mai i te Waengapū o Amerika i uru tāke kore mai ki tēnei whenua.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
reference: Ahakoa e waru tekau paehēneti o ā mātau rawa ka tāketia nā te tāke hoko tāwāhi ki ngā whenua o te Pokapū o Amerika. ka manaakitia koutou e mātou.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
reference: Kāore i mārama ki ahau; ā, kāore pū i te tika.

source: All I say to people is you treat us the way we treat you.
reference: Ko tāku kupu anake ki te tangata, whāngaingia au pēnei i au e whāngai nei i a koe.

source: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger signed into law a bill that bans the sale or rental of violent video games to minors.
reference: Nā te Kāwana o California, nā Arnold Schwarzenegger te hainatanga kia ture ai te pire e pei atu ai i te hokonga atu o ngā kēmu ataata kikino ki ngā taitamariki.

source: The bill requires violent video games sold in the state of California to be labeled with a decal reading "18" and makes their sale to a minor punishable by a fine of $1000 per offense.
reference: E mea ana tēnei Pire me mau pane "18" ngā kēmu ataata katoa ka hokona ki te takiwā o Kariwhōnia, ā, mēna ka hokona atu he kēmu ki te hunga tamariki, ka hāmenetia koe mō te $1,000 mo ia tūkinotanga.

source: The Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, gave a statement this morning announcing the prosecution of both Huhne and Pryce.
reference: I kī ake i te ata nei te kaiwhakahaere o ngā whakawākanga tūmatawhānui, a Kier Starmer QC, e pā ana ki te hāmenetanga o Huhne rāua tahi ko Pryce.

source: Huhne has resigned and he will be replaced in the Cabinet by Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP is expected to take the Business Minister job Davey is vacating.
reference: Kua heke a Huhne i tana tūranga, kua eke mai ko Ed Davey ki te komiti whāiti. Tōna tikanga ka eke atu hoki a Norman Lamb MP ki te whakakapi i te tūranga minita mō ngā mahi Pakihi.

source: Huhne and Pryce are scheduled to appear at the Westminster Magistrates Court on February 16.
reference: Ka tū a Huhne me Pryce ki mua i te aroaro o te kōti o Westminster, hei te 16 o Pēpuere.
